fact_nuggets.text: Water Absorb (Japanese: Water Storage) is an Ability introduced in Generation III.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Restores HP if hit by a Water-type move. MD T D S Restores the Pokemon's HP if the Pokemon is hit by a Water-type move. B S L Conq. Restores HP if hit by a Water-type move. MD GtI Water-type moves restore HP instead of damaging the Pokemon. * The Pokemon absorbs Water-type moves, which restore its HP! * S MD The Pokemon absorbs Water-type moves, which restore its HP! MD RT DX The Pokemon absorbs Water-type moves to restore its HP.

Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generation III 1.1.2 Generation IV onward 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generation III [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokemon with Water Absorb is hit by a damaging Water-type move , its HP is restored by one quarter of its maximum HP, and the move will have no effect on that Pokemon (if a Pokemon with this Ability already has full HP, the Water-type move will do nothing). Water Absorb will not activate if the Pokemon is protected from the Water-type move. Generation IV onward [ edit | edit source ] Water Absorb will now also activate when a Pokemon with it is hit by a Water-type status move (although none targeted an opponent until Soak was introduced in Generation V ). Multistrike moves , such as Water Shuriken , will only activate the Ability once. If a Pokemon with Water Absorb is holding an Absorb Bulb or Luminous Moss , Water Absorb absorbs the move, so the item's effect is not triggered. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Water Absorb has no effect outside of battle.

Water Absorb will not activate if the Pokemon is protected from the Water-type move. Generation IV onward [ edit | edit source ] Water Absorb will now also activate when a Pokemon with it is hit by a Water-type status move (although none targeted an opponent until Soak was introduced in Generation V ). Multistrike moves , such as Water Shuriken , will only activate the Ability once. If a Pokemon with Water Absorb is holding an Absorb Bulb or Luminous Moss , Water Absorb absorbs the move, so the item's effect is not triggered.
Absorbs water moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.
